name: ALEXANDER DISEASE
definition: FIBRINOID LEUKODYSTROPHY rare autosomal dominant / sporadic CNS disease (< 500 cases)

demographics.Age: as early as first few weeks of life to 2 years

discriminating_features: contrast enhancement near tip of frontal horn

CT: contrast enhancement near tip of frontal horn

clinical.Prognosis: death in infancy / childhood usually within 10 years
